Dr Neil Hudson
Member of Parliament for Epping Forest

Campaigns

Improving Healthcare Provision and Local Services

We all depend on the NHS. I will work to protect and enhance our health services, improve access and reduce waiting times. I have helped secure a new Community...

Giving Every Child the Best Start in Life

I am passionate about education and believe every child deserves a world class educational journey. I want to see our young folk follow their dreams and be able...

Supporting the Economy

We have amazing and diverse businesses right across Epping Forest that we all use, enjoy and depend upon. Small businesses are vital to our local economy...

Caring More for Our Mental Health

I passionately believe that we need parity of esteem between physical and mental health, and I will fight so folk have better access to mental health provision...

Protecting Green Spaces, Agriculture and the Environment

Here in Epping Forest, we are so fortunate to have wonderful green spaces and our beautiful and precious Forest. This is so important for our health and...

Fighting for Better Transport Systems

I will strive for better transport – supporting drivers, repairing our roads and improving bus services. The Central Line is a vital artery for us – from...

Strengthening the UK's Security

National security is about defence – something I strongly support – but it is also about the economy, health, energy, food and biosecurity. Having been involved...

Supporting Animal Health and Welfare

As the first veterinary surgeon elected to the House of Commons since 1884, I am passionate about animal health and welfare. In the United Kingdom, we have some...
